label: Transparent monsoon rainfall motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a monsoon rainfall motif for a design system named Morphous Monsoon Rain: dense vertical tropical city rain, deep green rain-soaked foliage shapes, rain grey sheets, puddle blue reflections, isolated full subject, no text.
Subject: A single stylized-realistic column of monsoon rainfall as an opaque graphic motif: layered heavy raindrop streaks, wet tropical leaves and awning silhouettes at the edges, puddle splash crown at the base with blue reflections, dense operations-system mood, crisp silhouette suitable for UI theming.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding, vertical rainfall column fully visible, puddle splash base visible, no cropping.
Lighting/mood: overcast tropical city storm light, practical operational density, high contrast between deep green, rain grey, puddle blue, and dark wet shadows.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no landscape horizon, no people, no cars, no animals, no cartoon face, no readable text, no watermark, no decorative background, no purple or magenta in the subject.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Create a HORIZONTAL 16:9 design-system board for "Morphous Monsoon Rain". The canvas must be landscape, not portrait, formatted like a 3840x2160 presentation board.
Composition: one wide poster board with a dense but readable operations-system grid, 4 columns across and 3 rows down, large labels, generous gutters. Include a small motif preview of monsoon rain in a tropical city, then UI sections arranged horizontally.
System identity: Monsoon Rain; category weather; context tropical city; motif monsoon rainfall; system feel dense operations system.
Palette direction: deep monsoon green, rain grey, puddle blue, wet asphalt ink, cloud white cards, restrained amber warnings.
Required visible sections with short readable labels: Morphous Monsoon Rain, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Buttons, Inputs, Select, Textarea, Checkbox, Radio, Switch, Tabs, Badges, Alerts, Cards, Table, Command/Search, Navigation, Dense Dashboard, Queue Metrics, Rainfall Charts, Empty Loading Error states, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance.
Visual language: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, compact tables, route/status controls, wet leaf edge accents, rain-column dividers, puddle-blue focus rings, storm-grey surfaces, 8px card radius.
Text: short UI labels only, readable at preview size.
Constraints: no portrait layout, no tall poster, no generic purple gradients, no beach/ocean theme, no sunny weather, no random brand names, no watermark, no tiny unreadable text, no misspelling of "Morphous Monsoon Rain".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Create a HORIZONTAL 16:9 dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Monsoon Rain". The canvas must be landscape, not portrait, formatted like a 3840x2160 presentation board. It must feel like the dark translation of the light Morphous Monsoon Rain system, not a new theme.
Composition: one wide poster board with a dense but readable operations-system grid, 4 columns across and 3 rows down, large labels, generous gutters. Include a small motif preview of monsoon rain in a tropical city, then UI sections arranged horizontally.
System identity: Monsoon Rain; category weather; context tropical city; motif monsoon rainfall; system feel dense operations system.
Palette direction: deep wet-asphalt background, near-white rain text, dark monsoon green primary, puddle blue focus/accent, rain grey muted surfaces, cloud grey cards, restrained amber warnings.
Required visible sections with short readable labels: Morphous Monsoon Rain, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Buttons, Inputs, Select, Textarea, Checkbox, Radio, Switch, Tabs, Badges, Alerts, Cards, Table, Command/Search, Navigation, Dense Dashboard, Queue Metrics, Rainfall Charts, Empty Loading Error states, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance.
Visual language: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, compact tables, route/status controls, wet leaf edge accents, rain-column dividers, puddle-blue focus rings, storm-grey cards, dark operations cockpit, 8px card radius.
Text: short UI labels only, readable at preview size.
Constraints: no portrait layout, no tall poster, no neon overload, no generic purple gradients, no beach/ocean theme, no sunny weather, no flat pure-black-only background, no random brand names, no watermark, no tiny unreadable text, no misspelling of "Morphous Monsoon Rain".
